mapper.select: SELECT b_num, b_name, b_title, b_content, b_pwd, b_readCnt, b_date FROM spring_board ORDER BY b_num DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO spring_board(b_name, b_title, b_content, b_pwd, b_readCnt, b_date) VALUES (#{boardName}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardPasswd}, #{boardReadCnt}, #{boardDate})
